name: House Cosmouth
summary: Maritime archival and shipbuilding house anchoring Cosmouth’s trade, recordkeeping, and ocean-facing power.
motive: Preserve maritime influence, archive legitimacy, and shipwright strength within the Principalities.
power_relations: Works with The Union and other houses but guards its maritime indispensability closely
visible_membership_base: Archivists, shipwrights, sailors, tax clerks, maritime officers.
current_tension_or_vulnerability: A storm-heavy economy rewards expertise but leaves the house exposed to route disruption and accusations of gatekeeping.
